[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A cartoon SpongeBob-like character stands in front of a teal patterned background while holding a white sign that reads “yang bro rasakan.”

The main subject is a SpongeBob-like cartoon character with a yellow, square-shaped body, blue eyes, and a toothy smile, holding up a rectangular sign with both hands.

The setting appears to be an indoor or graphic-style illustrated background with a solid teal-blue field and darker teal line-art swirls, resembling an abstract or stylized wallpaper pattern.

The character wears a white shirt with a red tie, brown pants, and a belt-like band across the middle; his posture is upright and his arms are raised to hold the sign. The sign is white with a thin red border and is positioned slightly above and to the right of the character’s head, centered in the image. The overall lighting is flat and graphic, with no visible shadows; the camera angle is straight-on.

Visible Text:
yang
bro
rasakan

Practical Summary:
The image shows a cartoon character holding up a sign with the text “yang bro rasakan.” The background is a teal-blue abstract pattern with swirly shapes.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
